attacking_style: Demonstrates tactical aggression by bridging from breakaway groups to lead groups on crucial climbs, willing to sacrifice established position for better finale placement.
team_tactics: Soudal Quick-Step deploys him in breakaways with freedom to bridge to stronger groups when tactically advantageous, prioritizing optimal finale positioning over conservative break sitting.
terrain_preference: Punchy, steep finale climbs like the Mur de Huy where bridging efforts and positioning matter more than sustained climbing power.
vulnerability: Insufficient data to establish clear vulnerability patterns from single race observation.
key_patterns: Bridges from breakaway to lead group on final climbs, sacrificing established position.
Shows tactical aggression over conservative placement, particularly entering decisive climbs.
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to determine form trend or trajectory
